thesis.summary: Demand inflection may flow into a scarce upstream layer, but H4/H5 growth is not yet proven.
thesis.key_assumption: Revenue acceleration must appear in filings, not only in theme heat.
thesis.missing_proof: Customer/order and margin evidence still need primary-source confirmation.

monitors.claim: Market price implies H4/H5 growth while evidence currently supports H3.
monitors.falsification_trigger: Next filing or official guidance does not show revenue, margin, or backlog acceleration consistent with H4/H5.
monitors.source_required: Annual report, interim report, quarterly report, exchange announcement, or audited customer/order disclosure.
monitors.check_frequency: Each quarterly filing and major contract announcement.
monitors.action_if_triggered: Keep rating cap at B or lower; do not upgrade to core candidate.

monitors.claim: Demand should convert into higher-quality revenue and cash flow.
monitors.falsification_trigger: Revenue grows while receivables, inventory, or low-margin trade revenue grow faster than cash flow.
monitors.action_if_triggered: Downgrade the financial realization module and reassess thesis quality.

evidence_links.claim: H4/H5 growth is not proven by primary evidence yet.
evidence_links.source: Data preflight and latest filing review

notes: This example is intentionally conservative: high market-implied growth requires a valuation monitor.
